ASBESTOS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-11-2007 - IN THE ABSENCE OF JUDGE TANG WHO WAS UNAVAILABLE DUE TO AN ASSIGNMENT AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE, SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS HELD THIS DAY WITH REMAINING DEFENDANTS IN BRAYTON GROUP 386, MR. GIL PURCELL, ESQ. APPEARING ON BEHALF OF ALL PLAINTIFFS. PRODUCTIVE SETTLEMENT PROGRESS HAVING OBTAINED THIS DAY, THE CAUSE IS CONTINUED TO APR-25-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN 303 FOR FUTHER SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE.

(JUDGE TANG ON TEMPORARY ASSIGNMENT TO THE HALL OF JUSTICE). DEPT. 303 IS ADVISED THAT ALL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS HAVE BEEN EXHAUSTED.
